creator: jethro@jethron.id.au
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #12)

Sorry all, I think I've come across more rudely than intended!

I didn't mean to claim disabling the shortcut was the best solution or a fix for everyone, just mentioned that it worked for me to hopefully give more information to help find the core issue. Likewise that my hardware situation seemed different to aryeh's I thought was just additional information.

Apologies if I was pushy or rude in trying to help.

I can easily enable/disable the issue now so if I can help test any further solutions I'm happy to help.
